results.title: India wont be second to anybody in developing foundational AI models: IT Secretary

results.title: TN CM Vijay Offers Silver Sword to Goddess Mookambika, Makes Special Request at Kollur Temple
results.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay visited Kollur Mookambika Temple in Udupi, offered a silver sword to Goddess Mookambika and requested that it be used during daily Nitya Puja. The visit drew large crowds of devotees and supporters.
